---
title : "The Extent and Consequences of P-Hacking in Science"
date : "2015-03-01"
author : ["Megan L. Head", "Luke Holman", "Rob Lanfear", "Andrew T. Kahn", "Michael D. Jennions"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "PLOS Biology, 13(3) e1002106  [https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106)"
publication_short : "PLOS Biology, 13(3) e1002106  [https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Megan L. Head, Luke Holman, Rob Lanfear, Andrew T. Kahn, Michael D. Jennions (2015). *The Extent and Consequences of P-Hacking in Science*. PLOS Biology, 13(3) e1002106  [https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.1002106)

:::
